name: Thabo M.
quote: Harmony Private Home gave me the perfect balance of study and social life.

name: Lerato K.
quote: Affordable, safe, and close to campus. Highly recommend!

name: Sipho D.
quote: The maintenance team is always quick to help. I've never had an issue go unresolved for more than a day.

name: Nomsa P.
quote: The study areas are quiet and spacious — perfect for exam prep. It really feels like a home away from home.

name: James V.
quote: Having the gym and entertainment room on-site makes a huge difference. There's always something to do between classes.
